channel.title: Embedding on MonkeMan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Embedding on MonkeMan's Blog

item.title: Efficient Estimation of Word Representations in Vector Space
item.description: Paper Title: Efficient Estimation of Word Representations in Vector Space Link to Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/1301.3781 Date: 16. January 2013 Paper Type: NLP, Word-Embedding Short Abstract: This paper introduces word2vec, a novel model architecture that facilitates the embedding of continuous vector representations of words. 1. Introduction If you have an NLP system like a LLM, you first need to train this NLP system. To train it, you need to represent the words from the text on which you want to train as continuous numerical vectors; word2vec accomplishes this.
